Title: Retro Script Label Sticker | Yellow Decorative Decal for Crafting
Description:
Add a touch of vintage charm and personalized flair to your projects with this charming script decal. This striking sticker features a vibrant yellow background contrasted with bold red script, giving it a delightful retro diner or handcrafted feel.

  • Vivid Design: The rich yellow and deep red script pop, making it perfect for adding an instant pop of color to any medium.
  • Premium Sticker Quality: Made from durable, high-quality material designed to stick securely and resist fading, ensuring your designs last.
  • Easy Application: Simply peel and stick—ideal for crafters of all skill levels.

Whether you are enhancing personal items, decorating scrapbooks, or marking packaged goods, this decal is incredibly versatile. Use it to brand custom notebooks, jazz up water bottles, decorate laptops, or create unique gift tags. It's the perfect embellishment for crafters looking to add a touch of nostalgic, hand-lettered style to their work.
